# MVP Requirements Quality Checklist: 미니 코스 추천

**Purpose**: Validate that the MVP requirements are complete, clear, measurable, and bounded before the feature is treated as ready.
**Created**: 2026-05-17
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are the fixed choice counts for mood, time, budget, and companion fully specified as requirement-level constraints? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-002, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK002 Are the exact option labels or acceptable option values documented closely enough for a reviewer to detect unintended additions? [Clarity, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK003 Are all required recommendation result fields documented for both current results and recent results? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-015]
- [ ] CHK004 Are no-match requirements defined for both the message text and the user-facing adjustment guidance? [Completeness, Spec §FR-012]
- [ ] CHK005 Are storage-unavailable and malformed-recent-result cases documented as first-run-safe scenarios? [Completeness, Spec §FR-016, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK006 Is "conditions match" defined as satisfying all four user-selected constraints rather than any partial match? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK007 Is the tie-breaker order unambiguous when multiple courses match: lowest total cost, then shortest total time? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK008 Is the final tie-breaker for equal cost and equal time intentionally specified or intentionally left to data order? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-007]
- [ ] CHK009 Is "recent recommendation" clearly defined as the latest 1 successful recommendation rather than a history list? [Clarity, Spec §FR-014, Plan §Summary]
- [ ] CHK010 Is "정확히 맞는 코스 없음" required as exact visible copy or only as equivalent wording? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-012]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK011 Are the spec, plan, and tasks consistent that recent recommendations are latest-only despite the earlier planning prompt mentioning three items? [Consistency, Spec §FR-014, Plan §Summary, Tasks §Validation Notes]
- [ ] CHK012 Are the local-only boundaries consistent across feature scope, plan constraints, and task verification? [Consistency, Spec §Scope Boundaries, Plan §Technical Context, Tasks §T023]
- [ ] CHK013 Are time and cost display requirements consistent between current recommendation and recent recommendation views? [Consistency, Spec §FR-008, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-015]
- [ ] CHK014 Are responsive requirements consistent between the constitution alignment, success criteria, and implementation tasks? [Consistency, Spec §Constitution Alignment, Spec §SC-006, Tasks §T026]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK015 Can the primary recommendation scenario be objectively assessed from the written acceptance scenarios without relying on unstated UI assumptions? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §User Story 1]
- [ ] CHK016 Can the time and cost scenario objectively distinguish activity-level values from total course values? [Measurability, Spec §User Story 2]
- [ ] CHK017 Is the no-match acceptance criterion measurable enough to identify both the absence message and adjustment guidance? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §User Story 3]
- [ ] CHK018 Is the recent-result acceptance criterion measurable enough to distinguish empty first-run state, restored state, and replacement after a new success? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §User Story 4]
- [ ] CHK019 Are the measurable outcomes tied to concrete user-visible results rather than vague satisfaction claims? [Measurability, Spec §Success Criteria]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK020 Are primary, alternate, and exception flows represented across the four user stories? [Coverage, Spec §User Scenarios]
- [ ] CHK021 Are missing required input scenarios documented separately from valid no-match recommendation scenarios? [Coverage, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-012, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK022 Are repeated recommendation scenarios documented so old results and old empty states do not persist as current truth? [Coverage, Spec §FR-013]
- [ ] CHK023 Are first-run, return-visit, and new-success replacement scenarios documented for recent recommendations? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 4]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK024 Are boundary cases for courses that match mood and companion but exceed time or budget explicitly documented? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK025 Are long activity names and descriptions addressed as requirement-level layout constraints on mobile and desktop? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-017]
- [ ] CHK026 Are empty mock-data or insufficient mock-data conditions intentionally excluded or covered by sample-data assumptions? [Gap, Spec §Assumptions]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK027 Are responsive requirements stated with enough specificity to detect overflow, overlap, and unreadable text problems? [Clarity, Spec §FR-017, Spec §SC-006]
- [ ] CHK028 Are browser verification expectations documented for both mobile and desktop contexts before delivery is considered complete? [Coverage, Plan §Constitution Check, Tasks §T025, Tasks §T026]
- [ ] CHK029 Are dependency limits documented as requirement constraints rather than optional implementation preferences? [Clarity, Spec §Constitution Alignment, Plan §Technical Context]
- [ ] CHK030 Are local-only privacy and storage boundaries explicit enough to rule out account creation, server storage, and cross-device sync? [Clarity, Spec §Scope Boundaries, Spec §FR-014]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK031 Are assumptions about fixed option ranges documented separately from functional requirements so future changes can be reviewed deliberately? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK032 Are assumptions about sample course coverage sufficient to support both successful recommendation and no-match scenarios? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Tasks §T018]
- [ ] CHK033 Are excluded features such as maps, reservation, payment, sharing, login, and server APIs documented in one consistent boundary list? [Dependency, Spec §Scope Boundaries]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK034 Is the relationship between "same browser" storage and unavailable localStorage clarified enough to avoid conflicting expectations? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-014, Spec §FR-016]
- [ ] CHK035 Is the implementation-ready status of the spec clear now that tasks are complete while the spec still says Draft? [Conflict, Spec §Status, Tasks §Phase 7]

## Notes

- Focus areas: MVP requirements quality, recommendation rule clarity, local-only scope, recent recommendation persistence, responsive acceptance criteria.
- Depth: Standard.
- Actor/timing: Author/reviewer before treating the MVP as ready.
- Items are requirement-quality checks, not implementation test cases.
